title: The Correspondent
author: Virginia Evans
description: An epistolary family drama following retired Maryland woman Sybil Van Antwerp as letters, grief, secrets, and ancestry questions reshape her relationships.

title: Between Two Fires
author: Christopher Buehlman
description: A disgraced knight escorts a mysterious girl through plague-ravaged medieval France and into a brutal struggle between heavenly and infernal forces.

title: Kin
author: Tayari Jones
description: Two motherless girls in rural Louisiana grow up along sharply different paths while confronting abandonment, family history, and adulthood.

title: The Crossroads
author: C.J. Box
description: After Joe Pickett is left comatose, his daughters race to uncover who ordered the attack in this Wyoming-set series thriller.

title: Just Friends
author: Haley Pham
description: A recent graduate returns home to care for family and reconnects with her childhood best friend turned ex-boyfriend in a second-chance coastal romance.

title: Dear Debbie
author: Freida McFadden
description: A fired advice columnist with a dark moral code uses her intelligence and computer skills to pursue vigilante justice in suburbia.

title: You with the Sad Eyes: A Memoir
author: Christina Applegate
description: Christina Applegate reflects on her life, career, trauma, and multiple sclerosis diagnosis in a candid memoir.

title: Stripped Down: Unfiltered and Unapologetic
author: Bunnie Xo
description: Podcast host Bunnie Xo traces her path from a difficult early life to sobriety, reinvention, and entertainment success.

title: Maxi's Kitchen: Easy Go-To Recipes to Make Again and Again: A Cookbook
author: Maxine Sharf
description: A day-of-the-week cookbook built around approachable repeatable meals, from quick weeknight dishes to shareable weekend recipes.

title: The High-Protein Plate: 100 Satisfying Everyday Recipes
author: Rachael Devaux
description: A protein-focused cookbook with 100 everyday recipes, meal-prep guidance, and practical nutrition advice for balanced meals.
